{{Event Header|StS2 Reflections.png}} {{E|Reflections snoitcelfeR|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in {{2|Glory}}. == Options == {{Frame|Touch a Mirror}} {{TS|negative||Downgrade 2 random cards.}} {{TS|positive||[[Upgrade]] 4 random cards.}}
{{Frame|Shatter}} {{TS|positive||Duplicate your entire Deck.}} {{TS|negative||Add {{C|Bad Luck||2}} (curse) to your Deck.}} == Dialogue ==
What is this? Something feels wrong here...
...ereh gnorw sleef gnihtemoS ?siht si tahW
{{Frame|Touch a Mirror}}
You reach forth and meld into the reflection in front of you. Which one am I?
{{Frame|Shatter}}
You concentrate and identify a giant seamless mirror in front of you. With a swift kick you SHATTER the giant mirror! Right as you shatter the mirror your reflection braces itself as it becomes a thousand beautiful glittering shards. How can a place like this exist?
==Unlocking== {{E|Reflections snoitcelfeR|2}} is unlocked by the {{2|Timeline#They Return|They Return}} Epoch. [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
